name: Neto by Maropost Release Notes – 19 Aug 2021
body: [{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"OVERVIEW"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" Here's the latest updates coming in for v6.155."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"Minor Changes","bold":true}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"Added a staff user permission for the Daily Sales by Warehouse widget to control staff access to this information."}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"File upload manager will now accept .zip files."}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"Fixed an issue in the control panel sales order page. When calculating shipping cost for an order, the debug button will now display correctly."}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"Bug Fixes","bold":true}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"Fixed an issue in PayPal Express, where the PayPal shipping address is blank. Maropost Commerce will use the shipping address on the order instead."}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"Fixed an issue with the background colour of PNG images added using the API. The images will now display the correct background colour."}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]}]
